subject: English
chapter: A House Is Not a Home
author: Zan Gaudioso

activities_projects.title: Author’s Adjustment to New School
activities_projects.objective: Understand the challenges of adapting to a new environment
steps: Read the beginning of the story
Identify the reasons why the author felt uncomfortable in the new school
Write 4–5 sentences explaining his feelings
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains emotional struggles in a new environment

activities_projects.title: Description of the Fire
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the fire incident in the story
steps: Read the section describing the fire
List the events that happened during the fire
Write them in sequence

activities_projects.title: Mother’s Emotional Attachment
steps: Find the part where the mother runs into the burning house
Explain why she risked her life
Write 4 sentences about her emotional attachment
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the value of memories and emotions

activities_projects.title: Impact of the Fire on the Author
activities_projects.objective: Understand the emotional effect of the tragedy
steps: Identify the losses faced by the author
Explain how he reacted to these losses
Write 4–5 sentences

activities_projects.title: Embarrassment at School
activities_projects.objective: Understand the author's feelings in school after the fire
steps: Read the section describing the author's first day back at school
Write the reasons for his embarrassment
Explain them briefly

activities_projects.title: Kindness of Classmates
activities_projects.objective: Recognise acts of kindness and support
steps: Read the part where classmates help the author
List the items they collected for him
Explain how this helped him emotionally

activities_projects.title: Rebuilding Life
activities_projects.objective: Understand the symbolic meaning of rebuilding the house
steps: Read the part describing the rebuilding of the house
Explain how it symbolises rebuilding life
Write 4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Interprets symbolic meaning in the story

activities_projects.title: Role of the Cat in the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the emotional significance of the cat
steps: Identify the places where the cat is mentioned
Explain why the author loved the cat so much

activities_projects.title: Theme of the Story
steps: Think about the message of the story
Write 4–5 sentences explaining the theme

activities_projects.title: Personal Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real-life experiences
steps: Think about a difficult situation in life
Write 4–5 sentences explaining how support from others can help
